IntroPage.title: Your Mobile Banking
IntroPage.description: Send and receive money instantly, and pay for goods and services between BantuPay users — mobile banking built to move without friction, across the D.R. Congo and beyond.

HowPage.step1_description: Sign up in minutes just with your phone — no branch visit needed or paperwork.
HowPage.step2_description: Top up with any Visa card or Mobile Money.
HowPage.step3_description: Send and receive money instantly from family and friends.

AboutPage.title: About Bantu Pay
AboutPage.description: A mobile banking platform built to move money instantly, securely, and without friction — for families, businesses, and communities in Africa.
AboutPage.mission_headline: Financial freedom, no matter where you are.
AboutPage.image_alt: Contemporary illustration symbolizing the fusion of African heritage and modern fintech
story_blocks: It started with a simple question.
Why should moving money across Africa be so difficult?
Millions of people still face slow, expensive, and complicated financial services. Sending money, getting paid, or growing a business shouldn't be this hard.
We're creating a secure digital financial platform that enables people and businesses across Africa to send, receive, and manage money instantly and affordably.
More than a mobile banking app, BantuPay is building the financial infrastructure that connects people, businesses, and communities across the continent.
We believe where you live should never determine your access to financial opportunities.
This is the future of payments in Africa.
mission_left: Access to financial services should never depend on where you live or who you know.

Our mission is to remove barriers to financial inclusion by building simple, secure, and accessible solutions that empower people and businesses across Africa to send, receive, save, and manage money with confidence.
mission_right: Across Africa, millions of people still face barriers to making payments, getting paid, and accessing essential financial services.
BantuPay is changing that by creating a connected financial ecosystem where individuals and businesses can move money instantly, access modern banking services, and unlock new opportunities.
Because financial access isn't just about convenience—it's about opportunity, independence, and building a more inclusive future for Africa.

pillars.title: Security First
pillars.summary: Every transaction is protected, every account is safeguarded, and every user is treated as someone who deserves access to trusted financial tools.

pillars.title: Global Access
pillars.summary: Sending money shouldn't come with penalties. We are building a new standard for global movement where borders don't create barriers.

pillars.title: Speed & Efficiency
pillars.summary: Money moves faster and closer. We believe money should meet you where you are, instantly accessible anytime, anywhere.

pillars.title: Our Vision
pillars.summary: We see a future where anyone, anywhere can participate fully in the digital economy through a seamless financial ecosystem.

pillars.title: Our Impact
pillars.summary: Real impact — not just in numbers, but in lives improved. We're bridging the financial gap for millions in Africa.
